title: Imaging
description: The Imaging module integrates medical imaging data with clinical records, providing access to the OHIF Viewer for DICOM image review and tools for tracking imaging-based treatment response over time. Researchers and clinicians can correlate imaging findings with structured clinical data within patient timelines.
tips: Use the OHIF Viewer to review DICOM studies directly within Parthenon without requiring a separate imaging workstation.
Link imaging studies to corresponding clinical events in the patient timeline to provide longitudinal context for radiological findings.
Apply the Timeline Response tool to quantify and visualize tumor burden changes across serial imaging studies.
Ensure imaging data is de-identified in accordance with DICOM de-identification standards before ingestion into the platform.
Coordinate with your PACS administrator to configure reliable DICOM routing to the Parthenon imaging repository.
